scope: AgenC global durable memory store composes the upstream path, prompt, and scan behavior into runtime/src/memory/global-store.ts.

requiredBehaviors: Global memory store exposes the D-13 global memory root and MEMORY.md entrypoint.
Global memory path detection does not treat project memory files as global memory.
edgeCases: The global store remains independent from project memory path overrides.

requiredBehaviors: Global memory store ensures its directory before prompt loading.
Global MEMORY.md content is loaded and truncation follows the shared entrypoint caps.
edgeCases: Missing or empty global MEMORY.md returns no entrypoint snapshot.
Oversized global MEMORY.md content reports the byte-cap warning.

requiredBehaviors: Global memory scan returns only global topic files.
Global manifest formatting uses the shared memory header formatter.
edgeCases: Unknown frontmatter type degrades to an untyped header.
Already-aborted scans return an empty result.
Node runtime YAML fallback preserves frontmatter type and description fields.
